title: The Tale of Genji: The Paulownia Pavilion
description: The world's first novel: the radiant Prince Genji, his forbidden love, and the beauty that suffuses a world of sorrow.
introduction: The world's first novel: the radiant Prince Genji, his forbidden love, and the beauty that suffuses a world of sorrow.

translation.original_text: いづれの御時にか、女御、更衣あまたさぶらひたまひけるなかに、いとやむごとなき際にはあらぬが、すぐれて時めきたまふありけり。
translation.text: In a certain reign there was a lady not of the first rank whom the emperor loved more than any of the others.
